name: Grilled Beet and Smoked Trout Salad with Chiv
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the beets and slice into 1/4 inch thick rounds.
2. In a nonreactive pot, combine the vinegar, seeds, and sugar. Bring to a boil and reduce by half.
3. Add water and bring back to a boil. Add beets and cook until done but still firm. Remove from heat and let cool in liquid (beets can be prepared ahead of time).
4. To make lemon vinegar: Combine 2 ounces of strained cooking liquid from the beets with lemon juice.
5. Remove bones from trout; peel skin off fillets. Flake fish into small pieces about the size of lump crab meat.
6. In a blender, combine chives and grape seed oil until smooth; season with salt for chive oil.
7. Assemble salad: Warm beets on grill or skillet. Place 3 beet slices on each plate.
8. Drizzle chive oil around beets and lemon vinegar. Divide trout into portions and place over beets.
9. Finish salads by adding a small bunch of baby lettuce in center and sprinkling with lemon zest.
